scenarios.name: Explain How /optimize Works End-to-End
scenarios.description: Trace the full path from user typing /optimize to codeflash results, covering skill system, agent spawning, and the 6-step workflow

scenarios.name: Troubleshoot Hook Not Suggesting Optimization
scenarios.description: Diagnose why the auto-suggest hook is not firing after Python commits, walking through the hook lifecycle and script flow

scenarios.name: Register Plugin in a New Marketplace
scenarios.description: Prepare the plugin for registration in a hypothetical new marketplace, requiring understanding of both manifest schemas and versioning
